subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Court of the Divine Beloved, Whom the world's disdain and opposition, and the peoples' neglect and denial, have not deterred from His Purpose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد ساحت حضرت مقصود را که اعراض و اعتراض عالم و اغماض و انکار امم او را از اراده
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @business; financial; property matters, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition
